title: Neon Tetris
desc: 🧱 Classic block-stacking with a cyberpunk twist! Combo chains, energy power-ups, daily challenges, and achievements.

title: Neon Memory
desc: 🧠 Flip cards and find matching pairs! Test your memory with cyberpunk neon style. Multiple difficulty levels and time trial mode.

title: Neon 2048
desc: 🧮 Slide and merge tiles in the neon grid! Classic 2048 with cyberpunk vibes, multiple difficulty levels, and time attack mode.

title: Neon Harvester
desc: 🌐 Click to harvest data fragments in the cyber darknet! Build automated facilities, unlock achievements, and dominate the network.

title: Hack Runner
desc: 🏃 Sprint through the neon data stream! Dodge obstacles, collect energy, survive as long as you can.

title: Neon Merge
desc: 🔮 Drop neon orbs and merge matching colors to evolve them into powerful cores! How high can you evolve?

title: Neon Reflex
desc: ⚡ Cyberpunk reaction challenge! Tap glowing targets before they fade. Chain combos for massive points!
